name: liber
description: Liber — 永存的开放图书馆. A decentralized, AI-agent-friendly reading platform for CC0 books.

scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run test:cli
scripts.dev:api: npm run build && wrangler pages dev
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy
scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 execute liber --local --file=migrations/0001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute liber --local --file=migrations/0002_comments_votes.sql && wrangler d1 execute liber --local --file=migrations/0003_ai_usage.sql && wrangler d1 execute liber --local --file=migrations/0004_real_content_billing.sql && wrangler d1 execute liber --local --file=migrations/0005_social_graph.sql && wrangler d1 execute liber --local --file=migrations/0006_highlight_heat_index.sql
scripts.db:migrate: wrangler d1 execute liber --remote --file=migrations/0001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute liber --remote --file=migrations/0002_comments_votes.sql && wrangler d1 execute liber --remote --file=migrations/0003_ai_usage.sql && wrangler d1 execute liber --remote --file=migrations/0004_real_content_billing.sql && wrangler d1 execute liber --remote --file=migrations/0005_social_graph.sql && wrangler d1 execute liber --remote --file=migrations/0006_highlight_heat_index.sql
